message:
feat(python): add 14 missing MultiGraph methods + view types

Add nodes, edges, degree, adj/adjacency, copy, subgraph,
edge_subgraph, to_undirected, to_directed, add_weighted_edges_from,
remove_edges_from, update, number_of_edges_between methods to
PyMultiGraph, achieving method parity with PyGraph.

Add MultiGraphNodeView, MultiGraphEdgeView, MultiGraphDegreeView
types supporting len, in, iteration, data/keys kwargs.

Add MultiGraph.degree() method to Rust fnx-classes crate.

br-v90

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
